name: shadow-banner
_comment: The Shadow's standard — the world's cross-modal `shadow` motif made visible, and the deliberate dark mirror of the party `banner`. Same construction (a pole, a cloth, an emblem stamped at scale 2), but the cloth is dark shadow-violet (mage_sh) and it flies the shattered `shadow_sigil` (this Lab's face of the shadow, lightened to shadow_hi so it reads on the dark cloth) where the party banner flies the gold `crest`. Built by REUSE, not redraw.
